results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'Reset your afternoon' is a soft payoff — true but not surprising enough to stop a scroll; a specific number or counterintuitive angle would sharpen it.
rationales.clarity: Every slide lands one idea with a concrete action and nothing extraneous.
rationales.audience_fit: Tired-by-3pm, busy 25-year-old is the exact person this speaks to — no jargon, immediate relevance.
rationales.novelty: '20-minute nap, not too late' is textbook sleep advice that has circulated for years with no fresh angle here.
rationales.brand_fit: Hedging is consistent ('may support', 'can disturb'), no hype words, CTA ties naturally to the sleep-tracking product.
rationales.predicted_performance: Solid saves from nap-curious viewers but low share potential given the lack of a surprising hook or counterintuitive claim.
